Latex

Now, solve this!
Let A be a Noetherian local ring of Krull dimension d and let \(x_1, \dots, x_d\) be a system of parameters for A (so that A/\((x_1, \dots, x_d)\) is an Artinian ring). Then for all positive integers t, we have \[x^t_1 \dotsm x^t_d \notin (x^{t+1}_1 \dots x^{t+1}_d)\]
Oh, wait, wait, I thouhgt of a better one. \(\textbf{2+2=?}\)
"Solve it or die."
